parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server. If not specified, the default format is `application/json`.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: TTS model to use. One of `s1` or `s2-pro`. Defaults to `s2-pro`.

text.example: Hello, this is a Fish-Audio-compatible test.
text.description: The text to synthesize. Required, must be a non-empty string.

reference_id.description: Voice model id (single speaker). May also be passed as an array of strings for multi-speaker variants.

sample_rate.description: Sampling rate of the output audio (e.g. 16000, 22050, 44100).

latency.description: Latency mode. Upstream rejects empty values; defaults to `normal` if omitted.

chunk_length.description: Chunk length passed through to the upstream synthesiser.

max_new_tokens.description: Maximum number of new tokens to generate.

normalize.description: Whether the upstream should apply text normalization.

prosody.description: Prosody overrides forwarded verbatim to the upstream (e.g. speed, volume).

references.description: Inline reference samples forwarded verbatim to the upstream.

callback_url.description: Optional callback URL. When specified the response immediately returns `{"task_id": "5872ab00-3cf4-4040-a798-8510aaa16756", "started_at": "2025-05-09T12:34:56.789Z"}` and the final `{audio_url, ...}` payload is POSTed to this URL once the upstream call resolves.

total.description: Total number of voice models matching the query.

items.description: List of voice model entries on the current page.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: self
parameters.description: When true, only return models owned by the calling account.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by field accepted by upstream (e.g. `created_at`, `task_count`).

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

example.title: Marcus Aurelius
example.description: A historical voice model trained on classical recordings.

_id.description: The unique identifier of the voice model.

type.description: The type of the voice model (e.g. `tts`, `svc`).

title.description: The display title of the voice model.

description.description: Long-form description of the voice model.

cover_image.description: URL of the model's cover image.

train_mode.description: Training mode used to build the model.

tags.description: Free-form tags attached to the model.

samples.description: List of preview samples for this voice model.

created_at.description: When the model was first created.

updated_at.description: When the model was last updated.

languages.description: Languages supported by this voice model.

author.description: Public profile of the model's author.

action.description: Operation type. Use 'retrieve' to get the single task, and 'retrieve_batch' to get the batch of multiple tasks.
